allow: Bash(git commit -m "Initial commit - SmartKisan app with floating tab bar, green header layout, and farm map feature")
Bash(git commit -m "Add EAS project ID to app.json")
Bash(git checkout master -- .gitignore App.js app.json eas.json package.json package-lock.json)
